CustomField.description: Defines the naming pattern for the Informal Greeting field on Household Accounts. Uses merge field tokens like {!FirstName}. Example format: "{!FirstName}" produces "John and Jane." Only applies when Automatic Household Naming is enabled. Typically uses first names only for a casual greeting style.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Naming pattern for the Household Informal Greeting. Uses tokens like {!FirstName}. Typically first names only.
CustomField.label: Informal Greeting Format
